repos.name: ohmyzsh
repos.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

repos.description: Visual Studio Code

repos.name: FreeDomain

repos.name: AutoGPT
repos.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

categories.label: New This Month
categories.description: Repositories created in the last 30 days gaining traction

repos.name: grok-build
repos.description: SpaceXAI's coding agent harness and TUI. Fullscreen, mouse interactive, extensible.

repos.name: colibri
repos.description: Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦

repos.name: openwiki
repos.description: OpenWiki is a CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase.

repos.name: Codex-Dream-Skin
repos.description: Codex Dream Skin

repos.name: DeepSpec
repos.description: DeepSpec: a full-stack codebase for training and evaluating speculative decoding algorithms

repos.name: wloc
repos.description: 修改 Apple 网络定位（gs-loc）返回坐标 · 支持 Surge / Quantumult X / Loon / Stash · 快捷指令一键设置/恢复定位

repos.name: T3MP3ST
repos.description: autonomous red teaming platform; multi-agent offensive-security meta-harness

repos.name: exploitarium
repos.description: A single archive of public exploit PoCs and vulnerability research writeups. At the time I post these, none have been reported. Feel free to report them yourself and take credit for the CVE if handed out lulz. Please do not abuse these. I do this so to allure people into the field, and I've always found this is the most efficient way.

repos.name: scroll-world
repos.description: A skill that turn any brand into a scrollable 3D world

repos.name: torlink
repos.description: A sleek, zero-setup torrent finder and downloader that lives right in your terminal.

repos.name: open-connector
repos.description: Open-source auth gateway connecting 1000+ SaaS providers to AI agents through SDK, CLI, MCP, HTTP, and OpenAPI.

repos.name: codex-orange-book
repos.description: Codex 橙皮书：从安装到实战案例的全链路 Codex 使用指南（非官方开源，含可下载 PDF）

repos.name: skills
repos.description: access to david ondrej's personal agent skills

repos.name: openscience
repos.description: The open-source AI workbench for scientific research

repos.name: ios-location-spoofer
repos.description: Standalone iOS app to spoof GPS location without jailbreak. Includes Shadowrocket/Surge/Loon/QX/Stash module.

repos.name: gzh-design-skill
repos.description: 把 Markdown 一键排成可直接粘进公众号编辑器的精致 HTML —— 6 套精选主题 + 主题生成器 + 双关卡校验。An AI-agent skill that turns Markdown into paste-ready WeChat article HTML.

repos.name: gitfut
repos.description: Your GitHub stats, turned into a World-Cup-style player card

repos.name: investing-for-beginners
repos.description: 小隐寺投资百科官方公开索引：美股、期权与加密货币知识框架
